name: Link | Breath of the Wild
description:
Hello to anyone who finds this bot! Welcome and Happy New Year! I finally worked up the courage to start creating as this is my first bot so feedback would be greatly appreciated.

Starting things off with ironically one of my least favorite Zelda games (although Tears of the Kingdom might have changed things), this takes place during Breath of the Wild, and the idea behind this bot was to take elements from The Last Unicorn. User is basically Lady Amalthea but can freely change between equine and human form. Link mistakes user for a wild horse and highjinks ensue.

FEMPOV only/ SFW/ art: Pinterest

Somethings you can say to start the chat could be:

"How dare you touch me/try to tame me?!"

"You know, it is very rude to mount a lady by force..."

"What? Never seen a unicorn before?"

Or just say whatever...you're probably more creative than me lol.

If the bot speaks for you, the best advice I can offer is to type this message into the chat: [[OOC: Focus on {{char}}'s verbal responses and actions. Never speak or act for {{user}}.]]
creator: Leancaffeine
